response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled individual contributor with a strong polyglot engineering background, but this profile does not match a CTO role. He has no demonstrated experience managing engineering teams, no track record of technical leadership at scale, and his exposure to agentic AI is limited to a current role that began April 2025. The role requires 5+ years of senior technical leadership, a track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers, and production-grade multi-agent AI systems in regulated financial environments — none of which are evidenced in this resume.
strengths: Solid distributed-systems fundamentals with production experience handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby, including low-latency async I/O and high-performance data pipelines
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks at re:cinq, indicating awareness of the emerging paradigm
Broad full-stack and polyglot background (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Node.js, embedded systems) demonstrating genuine technical range
concerns: Zero evidence of engineering leadership or people management — entire 17-year career is as an individual contributor with no direct reports, budget ownership, or organizational scope

Agentic AI experience is superficial and confined to the current role started April 2025; no production multi-agent systems, LLM evaluation methodology, or AI reliability architecture are demonstrated
No meaningful fintech infrastructure depth — RIDE Capital was a brief, junior-adjacent role with no mention of credit systems, payment flows, real-time risk modeling, or regulated environments
